javadoc_before:
/** * Converts an Instant to milliseconds bound to a {@code long} without throwing {@link ArithmeticException}. *
    *
  • If the duration milliseconds are greater than {@link Long#MAX_VALUE}, then return {@link Long#MAX_VALUE}.
    • *
  • If the duration milliseconds are lesser than {@link Long#MIN_VALUE}, then return {@link Long#MIN_VALUE}.
    • *
* * @param instant The instant to convert, not null. * @return long milliseconds. * @see Instant#toEpochMilli() * @see Long#MIN_VALUE * @see Long#MAX_VALUE */
javadoc_after:
/** * Converts an Instant to milliseconds bound to a {@code long} without throwing {@link ArithmeticException}. *
    *
  • If the duration milliseconds are greater than {@link Long#MAX_VALUE}, then return {@link Long#MAX_VALUE}.
    • *
  • If the duration milliseconds are lesser than {@link Long#MIN_VALUE}, then return {@link Long#MIN_VALUE}.
    • *
* * @param instant The instant to convert, not null. * @return long The given Instant in milliseconds. * @see Instant#toEpochMilli() * @see Long#MIN_VALUE * @see Long#MAX_VALUE */
entity_signature: public static long toEpochMillis(final Instant instant)
